subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book proclaimeth: The All-Bountiful hath indeed come with a sovereignty before which all necks have bowed low. Take heed, O ye who are endowed with understanding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ام الکتاب ینطق قد اتی الوهاب بسلطان خضعت له الرقاب فاعتبروا یا اولی الالباب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @proclamation to Christians, @proclamation to Jews, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
